name: Angel Food Snack
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the angel food cake into two layers.
2. Place one layer on a plate or bowl.
3. Spread half of the strawberries and half of the Cool Whip evenly over the first layer.
4. Repeat with the second layer, placing it on top and spreading the remaining strawberries and Cool Whip.
5. Chill before serving.
